_comment: Planned cadence per property per week from Marketing OP FY2026 (adopted 2026-06-09). Counts per ISO week. Pre-OP weeks (before 2026-06-09) are retro/informational actuals — adherence vs. this plan is only meaningful from week_ending 2026-06-15 onward. Social targets revised to 3x/wk per platform on 2026-06-23 per Ben (WBR comment) — prior bsky/masto targets (glyc 5, ibd 4) were too aggressive for current capacity.
